2606.15971.title: SAG: SQL-Retrieval Augmented Generation with Query-Time Dynamic Hyperedges
2606.15971.paper_summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers an effective approach for large language models to access external knowledge. However, existing methods rely on dense similarity retrieval and face inherent limitations in handling structured constraints and multi-hop reasoning. Incorporating knowledge graphs partially alleviates these issues, but at the cost of semantic fragmentation, high maintenance overhead, and difficult incremental updates. This paper introduces SAG (SQLRetrieval Augmented Generation), a structured architecture for retrieval and agent systems. Instead of pre-building a global static graph, SAG converts each chunk into one semantically complete event and a set of indexing entities, then uses SQL join queries to dynamically link events that share entities into local hyperedges,constructing, at query time, a dynamically instantiated local index structure. This design avoids the need for global graph rebuilding and ongoing maintenance; the system naturally supports incremental writes, concurrent processing, and continuous scaling through its reliance on standard database infrastructure. Across HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHop, and MuSiQue, three standard multi-hop benchmarks,SAG achieves the best results on 8 out of 9 Recall@K metrics, reaching 80.0% Recall@5 on MuSiQue, the benchmark with the highest multi-hop reasoning demands.SAG has also been deployed at a production scale of hundreds of millions of data items, with online retrieval latency kept within seconds. Project site and code are available at https://github.com/Zleap-AI/SAG-Benchmark.
2606.15971.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）為大型語言模型提供了一種有效的外部知識訪問方法。<lb/>然而，現有方法依賴於密集相似性檢索，並在處理結構化約束和多跳推理時面臨固有的限制。<lb/>整合知識圖譜在一定程度上緩解了這些問題，但代價是語義碎片化、高維護開銷和難以增量更新。<lb/>本文介紹了SAG（SQL檢索增強生成），這是一種用於檢索和代理系統的結構化架構。<lb/>SAG並不預先構建全局靜態圖，而是將每個區塊轉換為一個語義完整的事件和一組索引實體，然後使用SQL聯接查詢動態鏈接共享實體的事件到本地超邊，並在查詢時構建動態實例化的本地索引結構。<lb/>這一設計避免了全局圖重建和持續維護的需求；該系統自然支持增量寫入、並發處理和通過依賴標準數據庫基礎設施的持續擴展。<lb/>在HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHop和MuSiQue這三個標準多跳基準中，SAG在9個Recall@K指標中的8個上達到了最佳結果，在MuSiQue上達到80.0%的Recall@5，這是對多跳推理要求最高的基準。<lb/>SAG還已在數億數據項的生產規模上部署，並保持在線檢索延遲在幾秒內。<lb/>項目網站和代碼可在https://github.com/Zleap-AI/SAG-Benchmark獲得。
2606.15971.author: Yuchao Wu et.al.
2606.15971.authors: Yuchao Wu, Junqin Li, XingCheng Liang, Yongjie Chen, Yinghao Liang, Linyuan Mo, Guanxian Li
